fields.label: Access Key ID
fields.description: AWS IAM access key id with route53:* on the hosted zone.

fields.label: Secret Access Key
fields.description: AWS IAM secret. Rotate by clearing via db.set_value, then re-saving.

fields.label: Region
fields.description: AWS API region for signing. Route 53 is global, so this is not a placement region (that's the one `Atlas Settings.region`); us-east-1 is a safe default. Only change it for the AWS China partition.
